GPIO

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x51600000
Size:
0x78
Source:
gpio_rf.rdl

Description

General Purpose I/O controller. APB slave with 4 ports (A/B/C/D) mapping to 112 independently configurable GPIO signals. Port A supports configurable interrupt generation with optional debounce. Ports B/C/D are output-data and direction only.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x00 swporta_dr Port A Data
0x04 swporta_ddr Port A Data Direction
0x08 - -
0x30 inten Interrupt Enable
0x34 intmask Interrupt Mask
0x38 inttype_level Interrupt Type
0x3C int_polarity Interrupt Polarity
0x40 intstatus Interrupt Status
0x44 raw_intstatus Raw Interrupt Status
0x48 debounce Debounce Enable
0x4C porta_eoi Port A End of Interrupt
0x50 ext_porta External Port A
0x54 - -
0x60 ls_sync Level-Sensitive Synchronization
0x64 id_code GPIO ID Code
0x68 - -
0x6C ver_id_code GPIO Component Version
0x70 config_reg2 GPIO Configuration Register 2
0x74 config_reg1 GPIO Configuration Register 1
